headline: Wizeline Names Inés Casares as Chief Executive Officer
summary: The appointment marks an exciting new chapter as Wizeline accelerates its AI-native strategy and positions itself for long-term global growth Inés Casares, Wizeline CEO Wizeline, a global technology company providing AI-centric software product engineering services, today announced that Inés Casares has been appointed Chief Executive Officer, effective immediately. headline: Mizuho Maintains Neutral on Cognizant Tech Solns, Lowers Price Target to $68
summary: Mizuho  analyst Dan Dolev   maintains Cognizant Tech Solns (NASDAQ:CTSH) with a Neutral and lowers the price target from $87 to $68.

headline: Cognizant weighs up to 15,000 job cuts, most in India
summary: The planned cuts follow Project Leap, under which Cognizant expects $230m–$320m in severance costs in Q2 2026.

raw.headline: Cognizant weighs up to 15,000 job cuts, most in India

headline: CrowdStrike Gartner Leader Status And QuiltWorks Expansion Deepen AI Security Role
summary: CrowdStrike Holdings (NasdaqGS:CRWD) is named a Leader in the 2026 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Cyberthreat Intelligence Technologies. The company expands its Project QuiltWorks coalition, adding global partners including Armadin, Cognizant, HCLTech, Infosys, KPMG, NTT DATA, Tata Consultancy Services, and Wipro. Project QuiltWorks focuses on applying frontier AI to cybersecurity risk management across enterprises. CrowdStrike, known for its Falcon platform and focus on AI-powered...
